name: ai-golden-set-evals
primary_metric: Golden-set behavioral coverage of the deterministic AI insight engine: every InsightService rule + confidence band + escalation threshold pinned by >=1 golden case, run in the ai-engine pytest suite (PR gate).

success_metrics.primary: All 4 InsightService segment rule-sets (training/nutrition/recovery/stats) + confidence scoring + escalate_to_llm threshold covered by golden cases; suite green
secondary: Edge cases pinned (empty fields, zero/saturated cohort, unknown segment)
Live-LLM eval path scaffolded + skips cleanly when LLM_API_KEY unset (matches dep-skip convention)

kill_criteria: Golden harness becomes flaky (non-deterministic) — would violate the 'deterministic AI is gateable' premise; revert to advisory.
Golden set pins implementation detail rather than behavioral contract (brittle to benign refactors).
kill_criteria_resolution: Neither fired. Harness asserts behavioral contracts (signal presence/absence, confidence bands, escalate boolean) not internal structure; InsightService is pure-deterministic so flake is structurally impossible (60/60). Live-LLM path gated behind unset LLM_API_KEY and skips cleanly (0 flake). Negative control (mutate a rule -> golden case fails) proves the set catches real regressions.
dispatch_pattern: operator-driven (T10 from test-coverage master plan; AI golden-set eval harness)

tasks.summary: Scope AI surface — confirmed deterministic InsightService (not LLM); golden target identified
Author golden-set cases covering all 4 segments + confidence + escalation + edges
Build pytest golden harness (parametrized over JSONL)
Scaffold live-LLM eval path that skips cleanly when LLM_API_KEY unset
Wire into ai-engine suite (PR gate) + document

prd.note: b_medium; scope defined in test-coverage master plan T10

learn.note: b_medium test-infra; learn folded into case study
